approved_command_preview: $repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine'); call https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions using DCOIR_GEMINI_API; on failure, write committed diagnostics beside the exec workflow report before rethrowing.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$requestId = 'exec-20260528-gemini-api-smoke-diagnostic-002'
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$reportDir = Join-Path $repo ('chatgpt_staging/status_reports/chatgpt-exec/' + $requestId)
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $reportDir | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $downloads | Out-Null
$summaryJsonPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'gemini_api_smoke_summary.json'
$summaryMdPath = Join-Path $reportDir 'gemini_api_smoke_summary.md'
$apiKey = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_GEMINI_API','Machine')
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($apiKey)) { throw 'DCOIR_GEMINI_API is not available in the runner environment.' }
$headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $apiKey"; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' }
$bodyObject = [ordered]@{ model = 'gemini-2.5-flash'; messages = @(@{ role = 'user'; content = 'Hello from DCOIR Gemini diagnostic smoke test. Reply with the single word READY.' }) }
$bodyJson = $bodyObject | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8
try {
  $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions' -Headers $headers -Body $bodyJson
  $choiceText = ''
  if ($null -ne $response.choices -and $response.choices.Count -gt 0 -and $null -ne $response.choices[0].message) {
    $choiceText = [string]$response.choices[0].message.content
  }
  $summary = [ordered]@{
    request_id = $requestId
    result = 'success'
    endpoint = 'https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions'
    model_requested = 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    response_id = [string]$response.id
    response_model = [string]$response.model
    first_choice_content = $choiceText
    created_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')
  }
  $summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Out-File -FilePath $summaryJsonPath -Encoding utf8
  $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 12 | Out-File -FilePath (Join-Path $downloads 'gemini_api_smoke_response.json') -Encoding utf8
  @('# Gemini API smoke test','',('- endpoint: https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions'),('- model_requested: gemini-2.5-flash'),('- response_model: ' + [string]$response.model),('- response_id: ' + [string]$response.id),('- first_choice_content: ' + $choiceText),('- created_utc: ' + (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))) | Out-File -FilePath $summaryMdPath -Encoding utf8
}
catch {
  $exceptionMessage = $_.Exception.Message
  $statusCode = ''
  try { if ($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode) { $statusCode = [string][int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } } catch {}
  $errorDetails = ''
  try { if ($_.ErrorDetails -and $_.ErrorDetails.Message) { $errorDetails = [string]$_.ErrorDetails.Message } } catch {}
  $summary = [ordered]@{
    request_id = $requestId
    result = 'failure'
    endpoint = 'https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions'
    model_requested = 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    status_code = $statusCode
    exception_message = $exceptionMessage
    error_details = $errorDetails
    created_utc = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')
  }
  $summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Out-File -FilePath $summaryJsonPath -Encoding utf8
  @('# Gemini API smoke test failure','',('- endpoint: https://api.genai.mil/v1/chat/completions'),('- model_requested: gemini-2.5-flash'),('- status_code: ' + $statusCode),('- exception_message: ' + $exceptionMessage),('- error_details: ' + $errorDetails),('- created_utc: ' + (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'))) | Out-File -FilePath $summaryMdPath -Encoding utf8
  throw
}
